17	package plugins
18	
19	import "fmt"
20	
21	const (
22		// PluginName for NodeAffinityScoring.
23		NodeAffinityScoringPluginName = "NodeAffinityScoring"
24	)
25	
26	// NodeAffinityScoring is the plugin that implements the ScorePlugin interface.
27	type NodeAffinityScoring struct {
28		BasePlugin `json:",inline"`
29	
30		// Platforms is a required field and must contain at least one entry.
31		// +kubebuilder:validation:MinItems=1
32		Platforms []NodeAffinityScoringPlatformTerm `json:"platforms" protobuf:"bytes,2,opt,name=platforms"`
33	}
34	
35	// ValidateArchitecturesSet checks whether duplicate architectures are set in NodeAffinityScoring
36	func (n *NodeAffinityScoring) ValidateArchitecturesSet() (bool, error) {
37		seen := make(map[string]struct{})
38		for _, term := range n.Platforms {
39			if _, exists := seen[term.Architecture]; exists {
40				return false, fmt.Errorf("duplicate architecture %q found in nodeAffinityScoring.platforms", term.Architecture)
41			}
42	
43			seen[term.Architecture] = struct{}{}
44		}
45		return true, nil
46	}
47	
48	// NodeAffinityScoringPlatformTerm holds configuration for specific platforms, with required fields validated.
49	type NodeAffinityScoringPlatformTerm struct {
50		// Architecture must be a list of non-empty string of arch names.
51		// +kubebuilder:validation:Enum=arm64;amd64;ppc64le;s390x
52		Architecture string `json:"architecture" protobuf:"bytes,1,rep,name=architecture"`
53	
54		// weight associated with matching the corresponding NodeAffinityScoringPlatformTerm,
55		// in the range 1-100.
56		// +kubebuilder:validation:Minimum:=1
57		// +kubebuilder:validation:Maximum:=100
58		Weight int32 `json:"weight" protobuf:"bytes,3,rep,name=weight"`
59	}
60	
61	// Name returns the name of the NodeAffinityScoringPluginName.
62	func (b *NodeAffinityScoring) Name() string {
63		return NodeAffinityScoringPluginName
64	}
65

17	package v1beta1
18	
19	import (
20		"fmt"
21		"strings"
22	
23		metav1 "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1"
24	
25		"github.com/openshift/library-go/pkg/operator/v1helpers"
26	
27		"github.com/openshift/multiarch-tuning-operator/api/common"
28		"github.com/openshift/multiarch-tuning-operator/api/common/plugins"
29	)
30	
31	// ClusterPodPlacementConfigSpec defines the desired state of ClusterPodPlacementConfig
32	type ClusterPodPlacementConfigSpec struct {
33		// LogVerbosity is the log level for the pod placement components.
34		// Valid values are: "Normal", "Debug", "Trace", "TraceAll".
35		// Defaults to "Normal".
36		// +optional
37		// +kubebuilder:default=Normal
38		LogVerbosity common.LogVerbosityLevel `json:"logVerbosity,omitempty"`
39	
40		// NamespaceSelector selects the namespaces where the pod placement operand can process the nodeAffinity
41		// of the pods. If left empty, all the namespaces are considered.
42		// The default sample allows to exclude all the namespaces where the
43		// label "multiarch.openshift.io/exclude-pod-placement" exists.
44		// +optional
45		NamespaceSelector *metav1.LabelSelector `json:"namespaceSelector,omitempty"`
46	
47		// Plugins defines the configurable plugins for this component.
48		// This field is optional and will be omitted from the output if not set.
49		// +optional
50		Plugins *plugins.Plugins `json:"plugins,omitempty"`
51	
52		// FallbackArchitecture defines the architecture to use if the image inspector cannot determine the image's architecture.
53		// If configured, the PodPlacementController will set the node affinity of the pod to the fallback architecture
54		// if the image inspector cannot determine the image's architecture.
55		// +optional
56		// +kubebuilder:default=""
57		// +kubebuilder:validation:Enum=arm64;amd64;ppc64le;s390x;""
58		FallbackArchitecture string `json:"fallbackArchitecture,omitempty"`
59	}

1	package v1beta1
2	
3	import (
4		"testing"
5	
6		v1 "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1"
7	)
8	
9	func Test_conditionFromBool(t *testing.T) {
10		type args struct {
11			b bool
12		}
13		tests := []struct {
14			name string
15			args args
16			want v1.ConditionStatus
17		}{
18			{
19				name: "Test conditionFromBool with true",
20				args: args{b: true},
21				want: v1.ConditionTrue,
22			},
23			{
24				name: "Test conditionFromBool with false",
25				args: args{b: false},
26				want: v1.ConditionFalse,
27			},
28		}
29		for _, tt := range tests {
30			t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
31				if got := conditionFromBool(tt.args.b); got != tt.want {
32					t.Errorf("conditionFromBool() = %v, want %v", got, tt.want)
33				}
34			})
35		}
36	}
37	
38	func Test_notFromBool(t *testing.T) {
39		type args struct {
40			b bool
41		}
42		tests := []struct {
43			name string
44			args args
45			want string
46		}{
47			{
48				name: "Test notFromBool with true",
49				args: args{b: true},
50				want: "",
51			},
52			{
53				name: "Test notFromBool with false",
54				args: args{b: false},
55				want: "not ",
56			},
57		}
58		for _, tt := range tests {
59			t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
60				if got := notFromBool(tt.args.b); got != tt.want {
61					t.Errorf("notFromBool() = %v, want %v", got, tt.want)
62				}
63			})
64		}
65	}
66	
67	func Test_trimAndCapitalize(t *testing.T) {
68		type args struct {
69			s string
70		}
71		tests := []struct {
72			name string
73			args args
74			want string
75		}{
76			{
77				name: "Test trimAndCapitalize with empty string",
78				args: args{s: ""},
79				want: "",
80			},
81			{
82				name: "Test trimAndCapitalize with single character",
83				args: args{s: "a"},
84				want: "A",
85			},
86			{
87				name: "Test trimAndCapitalize with multiple characters",
88				args: args{s: "abc"},
89				want: "Abc",
90			},
91			{
92				name: "Test trimAndCapitalize with multiple characters and spaces",
93				args: args{s: "  ab c  "},
94				want: "Ab c",
95			},
96		}
97		for _, tt := range tests {
98			t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
99				if got := trimAndCapitalize(tt.args.s); got != tt.want {
100					t.Errorf("trimAndCapitalize() = %v, want %v", got, tt.want)
101				}
102			})
103		}
104	}
105	
106	func TestClusterPodPlacementConfigStatus_Build(t *testing.T) {
107		tests := []struct {
108			name                                           string
109			podPlacementControllerAvailable                bool
110			podPlacementWebhookAvailable                   bool
111			podPlacementControllerUpToDate                 bool
112			podPlacementWebhookUpToDate                    bool
113			mutatingWebhookConfigurationAvailable          bool
114			deprovisioning                                 bool
115			expectDegraded                                 bool
116			expectDeprovisioning                           bool
117			expectMutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable bool
118			expectPodPlacementControllerNotReady           bool
119			expectPodPlacementWebhookNotReady              bool
120			expectAvailable                                bool
121			expectProgressing                              bool
122			expectCanDeployMutatingWebhook                 bool
123		}{
124			{
125				name:                                           "Deprovisioning",
126				podPlacementControllerAvailable:                true,
127				podPlacementWebhookAvailable:                   true,
128				podPlacementControllerUpToDate:                 true,
129				podPlacementWebhookUpToDate:                    true,
130				mutatingWebhookConfigurationAvailable:          true,
131				deprovisioning:                                 true,
132				expectDegraded:                                 false,
133				expectDeprovisioning:                           true,
134				expectMutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable: false,
135				expectPodPlacementControllerNotReady:           false,
136				expectPodPlacementWebhookNotReady:              false,
137				expectAvailable:                                true,
138				expectProgressing:                              false,
139				expectCanDeployMutatingWebhook:                 false,
140			},
141			{
142				name:                                           "AllAvailableAndUpToDate",
143				podPlacementControllerAvailable:                true,
144				podPlacementWebhookAvailable:                   true,
145				podPlacementControllerUpToDate:                 true,
146				podPlacementWebhookUpToDate:                    true,
147				mutatingWebhookConfigurationAvailable:          true,
148				deprovisioning:                                 false,
149				expectDegraded:                                 false,
150				expectDeprovisioning:                           false,
151				expectMutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable: false,
152				expectPodPlacementControllerNotReady:           false,
153				expectPodPlacementWebhookNotReady:              false,
154				expectAvailable:                                true,
155				expectProgressing:                              false,
156				expectCanDeployMutatingWebhook:                 true,
157			},
158			{
159				name:                                           "MutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable",
160				podPlacementControllerAvailable:                true,
161				podPlacementWebhookAvailable:                   true,
162				podPlacementControllerUpToDate:                 true,
163				podPlacementWebhookUpToDate:                    true,
164				mutatingWebhookConfigurationAvailable:          false,
165				deprovisioning:                                 false,
166				expectDegraded:                                 true,
167				expectDeprovisioning:                           false,
168				expectMutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable: true,
169				expectPodPlacementControllerNotReady:           false,
170				expectPodPlacementWebhookNotReady:              false,
171				expectAvailable:                                false,
172				expectProgressing:                              true,
173				expectCanDeployMutatingWebhook:                 true,
174			},
175			{
176				name:                                           "PodPlacementControllerNotAvailable",
177				podPlacementControllerAvailable:                false,
178				podPlacementWebhookAvailable:                   true,
179				podPlacementControllerUpToDate:                 false,
180				podPlacementWebhookUpToDate:                    true,
181				mutatingWebhookConfigurationAvailable:          true,
182				deprovisioning:                                 false,
183				expectDegraded:                                 true,
184				expectDeprovisioning:                           false,
185				expectMutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable: false,
186				expectPodPlacementControllerNotReady:           true,
187				expectPodPlacementWebhookNotReady:              false,
188				expectAvailable:                                false,
189				expectProgressing:                              true,
190				expectCanDeployMutatingWebhook:                 false,
191			},
192			{
193				name:                                           "PodPlacementWebhookNotUpToDate",
194				podPlacementControllerAvailable:                true,
195				podPlacementWebhookAvailable:                   true,
196				podPlacementControllerUpToDate:                 true,
197				podPlacementWebhookUpToDate:                    false,
198				mutatingWebhookConfigurationAvailable:          true,
199				deprovisioning:                                 false,
200				expectDegraded:                                 false,
201				expectDeprovisioning:                           false,
202				expectMutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable: false,
203				expectPodPlacementControllerNotReady:           false,
204				expectPodPlacementWebhookNotReady:              true,
205				expectAvailable:                                true,
206				expectProgressing:                              true,
207				expectCanDeployMutatingWebhook:                 true,
208			},
209		}
210	
211		for _, tt := range tests {
212			t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
213				s := &ClusterPodPlacementConfigStatus{}
214				s.Build(
215					tt.podPlacementControllerAvailable,
216					tt.podPlacementWebhookAvailable,
217					tt.podPlacementControllerUpToDate,
218					tt.podPlacementWebhookUpToDate,
219					tt.mutatingWebhookConfigurationAvailable,
220					tt.deprovisioning,
221				)
222	
223				if s.degraded != tt.expectDegraded {
224					t.Errorf("degraded = %v, expected %v", s.degraded, tt.expectDegraded)
225				}
226				if s.deprovisioning != tt.expectDeprovisioning {
227					t.Errorf("deprovisioning = %v, expected %v", s.deprovisioning, tt.expectDeprovisioning)
228				}
229				if s.mutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable != tt.expectMutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable {
230					t.Errorf("mutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable = %v, expected %v", s.mutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable, tt.expectMutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable)
231				}
232				if s.podPlacementControllerNotReady != tt.expectPodPlacementControllerNotReady {
233					t.Errorf("podPlacementControllerNotReady = %v, expected %v", s.podPlacementControllerNotReady, tt.expectPodPlacementControllerNotReady)
234				}
235				if s.podPlacementWebhookNotReady != tt.expectPodPlacementWebhookNotReady {
236					t.Errorf("podPlacementWebhookNotReady = %v, expected %v", s.podPlacementWebhookNotReady, tt.expectPodPlacementWebhookNotReady)
237				}
238				if s.available != tt.expectAvailable {
239					t.Errorf("available = %v, expected %v", s.available, tt.expectAvailable)
240				}
241				if s.progressing != tt.expectProgressing {
242					t.Errorf("progressing = %v, expected %v", s.progressing, tt.expectProgressing)
243				}
244				if s.canDeployMutatingWebhook != tt.expectCanDeployMutatingWebhook {
245					t.Errorf("canDeployMutatingWebhook = %v, expected %v", s.canDeployMutatingWebhook, tt.expectCanDeployMutatingWebhook)
246				}
247			})
248		}
249	}
